projects.name: Loom By Light
projects.description: Arduino Appplication to assist with manual loom production of custom patterns.
projects.moreInfo: Loom by Light was a freelance project comissioned by a textile artist. The Arduino application was designed to run on low spec Arduinos, and allow converting of bitmap images into rows of LED lights for weaving on a manual loom.

projects.name: Fuzzy Kittens
projects.moreInfo: A group project at Algonquin College, I was the group leader and in charge of all of the back end.
